payload.answer: I have an existing memory that Sara is your daughter, but the new input says Sara is your niece. I need clarification before updating this memory.

entity_resolution.reason: The name Sara matches the existing memory subject, and the new claim concerns the same user's family relationship to Sara.

details: No durable memory was committed because the new relationship conflicts with an existing relationship for Sara.

repair_options: Keep the existing memory: Sara is my daughter.
Replace it with: Sara is my niece.
Record both only if both are true in your family context, with clarification.
